svg.aria-label: A reference trajectory and the open-loop actual response start together then steadily diverge, the growing shaded gap being the tracking error as load and disturbance pull the actual motion away
svg.title: A reference trajectory and the open-loop actual response start together then steadily diverge, the growing shaded gap being the tracking error as load and disturbance pull the actual motion away
svg.text: Open-loop: the actual motion drifts from the reference
load / friction / disturbance pull q away — nothing corrects it
